_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: A chi square analysis based on 2 × 2 contingency table resulted in p = 0.65 and p-value for two-tailed t test with one degree of freedom was 0.42
resourceName: Annexin V-FITC Apoptosis Detection kit (Calbiochem, San Diego, Cat # PF032)
details: Used to assess gamma irradiation sensitivity; no significant effect of merlin knockdown on radiosensitivity (p=0.65, p=0.42)
